[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00000010 1
2 00100111 4
3 00010101 3
4 10010100 3
5 11001000 3
6 00100111 4
7 00010101 3

01 11110000 4

23 11000010 3
34 00000000 a

56 10010100 3 match 4
67 10011110 5
70 11101111 7
